question: Process scoring shape: per-trial absolute rubric scores (anchored 1-5 scales) or comparative A-vs-B preference on transcripts?
author: claude/design

question: Scorers: LLM judge on all trials calibrated against human scores on the reviewed sample, or human-only?

question: v1 rubric dimensions: planning quality, exploration efficiency, error recovery, instruction adherence, destructive-action caution?

question: Transcript length policy: full transcript in judge context or CANT_SCORE (no silent truncation), vs recorded truncation policy?
